name: Donald Trump
summary: Day 81 of Hormuz blockade (Tuesday). **TRUMP POSTPONED THE PLANNED MAY 19 STRIKE LATE MAY 18 US TIME — TRUTH SOCIAL: 'WE WILL NOT BE DOING THE SCHEDULED ATTACK OF IRAN TOMORROW' AT THE REQUEST OF QATAR (EMIR TAMIM), SAUDI ARABIA (MBS), AND UAE (MBZ) FOR A '2-3 DAY / FIVE-DAY' WINDOW IN WHICH 'SERIOUS NEGOTIATIONS' ARE RUNNING THROUGH PAKISTAN.** The post explicitly framed the postponement as a pause, not a cancellation: Trump said he had instructed the US military to 'remain prepared for a full-scale assault on Iran at a moment's notice if negotiations fail to produce an acceptable agreement' (CONFIRMED ACTION — Trump Truth Social primary + CNBC + Bloomberg + NPR + Al Arabiya + Israel Hayom + Pravda Trump translation). At the White House Monday evening, Trump told reporters Saudi Arabia, Qatar, UAE 'and some others' asked him to put the strike off for 'two or three days, a short period of time, because they think they are getting very close to making a deal.' **The NYT 'as soon as next week' trigger (added May 17) resolves to POSTPONED_WITHIN_WINDOW rather than untripped_expired** — Trump's own framing keeps the kinetic option active inside the May 24 window. Iran state TV (IRIB) called the postponement a 'retreat' based on 'fear' via broadcast ticker and X account — converting the postponement into an Iranian rhetorical win, deepening the trust deficit on the negotiating track. **Market repricing**: Brent fell -2% to ~$109.15 on the post (CNBC primary, NDTV Profit), partly inverting Monday's $111.47 gap; Brent settled $110.32 (-1.6% 1D); WTI -4.7% to $103.57; VIX -3.3% to 17.82; RBOB -4.8%; Heating Oil -3.2%. **The structural premium is intact**: at $110.32, Brent is still 51% above the $73 pre-crisis baseline; Hormuz remains effectively closed (~1-30 vessels/day vs 138 pre-war); AWRP 4-6x pre-crisis; structural-bid trio (XLE +1.9%, Frontline +2.9%, Cheniere +2.4%, Lockheed +2.4% on $879M F-35 contract) all UP on a Brent-down day — premium has migrated out of crude flat-price into ton-miles, LNG basis, and defense backlog. **Helima Croft 'Tuesday close vs $112' binary resolves toward FALSE-POSITIVE SUSTAIN-RULE FIRE pending close**: StanChart $130-145 path loses momentum; Goldman base case ($120 Q3 / $115 Q4 if Hormuz remains mostly shut) re-anchors as central. **Tuesday May 19 NSC binary resolved in the diplomatic direction with hardening overlays**: (a) kinetic axis slipped 48-120 hours; (b) diplomatic axis hardened (Iran IRIB 'retreat-based-on-fear' framing); (c) proxy axis re-armed rhetorically (Houthis announced 'maritime blockade' of Haifa port — CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NO operational follow-through); (d) India fuel pass-through fired (2nd hike in a week, ~90 paise petrol/diesel — April 27 trigger ACTIVE_FIRED inside its 30-day window). Iran FM spokesman Baghaei (via Tasnim) confirmed counter-proposal delivered through Pakistan with demands: unfreezing of frozen assets, lifting of sanctions, end of US blockade of Iranian ports, 'stoppage of fighting in all aspects' including Lebanon, and compensation for war damages — far apart from US zero-enrichment red line. **Sadjadpour 'two hubris' frame operationally validated in real-time**: Trump's performative-dealmaker brand permitted accepting the Gulf-mediated postponement because it credits him; Iran's institutional architecture continues to require public framing of any pause as adversary-weakness. **The cleanest read: postponement, not de-escalation. The kinetic option remains administratively pre-staged.** PRIOR (May 18 — Monday): **TUESDAY MAY 19 NSC MEETING IS THE OPERATIONAL BINARY — Day 1 of 6 remaining in NYT 'as soon as next week' window (closes May 24).** Per Haaretz May 18 'As Trump Hesitates, Israel Prepares for Renewed Iran Strikes' (REPORTED — single Israeli sourcing chain), Trump is expected to convene his top national security team Tuesday May 19 to discuss options for military action. **No White House public confirmation through Monday morning IST.** **CONFIRMED WEEKEND EVENTS**: (i) Trump-Netanyahu phone call Sunday May 17 ahead of limited Israeli security cabinet meeting, both sides framing as discussion of 'renewing the war with Iran' (CONFIRMED ACTION); Netanyahu addressed Cabinet: 'our eyes are also open' regarding Iran, 'prepared for any scenario'; (ii) Trump posted **'for Iran, the clock is ticking'** on Truth Social later Sunday (CONFIRMED RHETORIC). Haaretz May 18 frames the operational binary: Trump described as hesitating despite NYT preparation reporting and his own escalatory rhetoric, while Israeli defense establishment positioning for unilateral preparation. **The Haaretz frame — 'As Trump Hesitates, Israel Prepares' — is the cleanest publicly stated US-Israel divergence signal of the cycle**: at minimum the senior IDF reading; at maximum a deliberate Israeli leak intended to pressure Trump toward action. **PRIOR (May 17): TRUMP PIVOTS FROM RHETORICAL REVERSAL TO KINETIC PREPARATION POSTURE.** On Sunday morning IST Trump posted on Truth Social an AI-generated graphic of himself + US Navy admiral with stormy waters and an Iranian-flagged ship, captioned **'It Was The Calm Before the Storm'** (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 17 liveblog primary + Ynet + Israel National News + India TV + Egypt Today + IANS + Arab Times + Al Bawaba); a second post showed an animation of a US warship targeting an aircraft marked with the Iranian flag, with Trump's voice ordering 'Okay, we have it in our sight. Fire!' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC). **The post-summit reversal pattern has now hardened from rhetoric into REPORTED military preparation** — NYT (Friday May 15 / Saturday May 16, citing two Middle Eastern officials) reported Israel + US are carrying out 'most intense preparations yet to renew attacks on Iran possibly as early as next week,' with options including (i) **commando operation to extract nuclear material believed buried under rubble at struck nuclear sites** ('thousands of supporting forces to create a perimeter,' US officials acknowledged 'would risk several casualties' and likely engage Iranian ground troops); and (ii) **ground forces to seize Kharg Island** (handles up to 90% of Iranian oil exports). NYT scoop amplified by Times of Israel May 16 liveblog, Jerusalem Post 'US-Israel Iran attacks could resume next week' article 896353, Gulf News 'Operation Epic Fury 2.0,' Fox News 'Next US move on Iran: Seize Kharg Island,' CNN Politics 'Trump returns from China with no Iran breakthrough — and a decision to make' (framed as decision between 'more strikes' vs 'continued focus on diplomacy,' Pentagon hawks favouring strikes / Vance-diplomacy track on other side). **NO on-record Pentagon/White House confirmation of operation planning.** **PARALLEL DIPLOMATIC TRACK INTENSIFIES (CONFIRMED ACTION):** Pakistani Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi arrived Tehran Saturday May 16 on 2-day official visit explicitly described in Pakistani official communications as 'to facilitate' US-Iran peace talks. **Trump can simultaneously prepare strikes and hold an open mediation channel — diplomatic and kinetic tracks now running in clear tension, not sequence.** This is structurally the SIXTH high-profile public posture shift in 30 days (joint statement Thursday → 'decimation' Truth Social same day → new letter Saturday → 'Calm Before the Storm' Sunday + parallel Pakistan-mediation track) — the rhetorical-volatility pattern is now structurally embedded as base case, not tail. **Vali Nasr structural-mismatch thesis at sharpest of cycle:** Trump's 'Calm Before the Storm' post + NYT preparation reporting compresses time horizon to days/weeks; Iran's six-pillar architecture (Araghchi/Shamkhani/Pezeshkian/Akraminia/IRGC/now Naqvi-mediation) is designed for a longer horizon. The structural mismatch will resolve one of two ways: Trump backs off the 2-month timeline OR kinetic action commences. **Helima Croft framing on test point of cycle:** Brent Monday close above $108 = 2-session-sustain rule met = StanChart $130-145 path activates. Brent below $108 = trinary regime holds against major escalation signal. **PRIOR (May 16):** Trump immediately reversed post-summit (FIFTH HIGH-PROFILE REVERSAL IN 30 DAYS — TRUTH SOCIAL 'MILITARY DECIMATION OF IRAN TO BE CONTINUED' + HANNITY 'I AM NOT GOING TO BE MUCH MORE PATIENT' + DETROIT NEWS 'DID NOT ASK CHINA FOR ANY FAVOURS' (directly contradicting his Wednesday Fox claim Xi offered to broker peace)**; and on **Saturday May 16 Trump confirmed he sent Iran a NEW NUCLEAR PROPOSAL LETTER demanding full dismantling + halt to all enrichment + end of proxy support within 2-month compliance window** (CONFIRMED letter sent — Trump confirmed; CLAIMED letter contents — RedState May 15 + Wikipedia 2025-2026 negotiations summary; full primary text not yet surfaced). Joint statement Thursday produced **ZERO operational follow-through** — no HEU-custodian framework, no Chinese security guarantees, no verification architecture. The China-as-HEU-custodian door yesterday's brief recorded as 'soft-confirmed at the rhetorical-alignment level' is now **operationally empty**; the joint statement WAS the deliverable, not a step toward one. Khamenei advisor Ali Shamkhani publicly responded that Iran is ready to sign in exchange for quick removal of all financial sanctions but criticised Trump's rhetoric — cleanest Iranian conditional-acceptance signal of the cycle, attached to the Supreme Leader's office rather than civilian government. Iranian officials simultaneously denied receiving any new US proposal and insisted Iran would not give up the right to enrich uranium. This is **structurally the FIFTH high-profile Trump public posture reversal in 30 days** (joint statement Thursday → 'decimation' Truth Social same day → new letter Saturday) — the rhetorical-volatility pattern is now structurally embedded in the cycle. **US MARKETS PRICED THE REVERSAL CLEANLY**: S&P -1.24% to 7,408.50 (off Thursday's 7,501 record), NASDAQ -1.54% to 26,225, Dow -1.07% lost 50K handle, 10Y Treasury +14bp to 4.595% (highest since Feb 2025), 30Y +11bp to 5.121% (highest since May 2025); Bloomberg labelled it 'the worst weekly Treasury rout in a year.' Tech sold off hard (Intel -6%, AMD -5.7%, Micron -6.6%, Nvidia -4.4%). The paper-equity leg of the cycle-extreme bifurcation yesterday's brief flagged (VIX 17.26 + S&P/NASDAQ/Dow records on a day with two kinetic incidents + Israeli KIA) **reversed within 24 hours** — paper-equity capitulated first, paper-Brent retraced modestly but did not deflate ($107.42→~$106; WTI +11% weekly), physical-shipping rates stayed elevated. **A SECOND MAJOR DIPLOMATIC TRACK SURFACED**: Financial Times May 14 reported **Saudi Arabia floated a Middle East non-aggression pact between Iran and regional states modelled on the 1975 Helsinki Accords**, with EU institutions explicitly backing the proposal (REPORTED single-original-source FT, amplified across MEE, Haaretz, Arab News). No Saudi formal MFA confirmation; no Iran formal response; Israel and US public stance 'unclear'; UAE-Saudi divergence flagged as a complication. **ISRAEL-LEBANON CEASEFIRE EXTENDED 45 DAYS to ~2026-06-29 with Pentagon-led security track to begin May 29** (CONFIRMED — State Dept primary, Bloomberg, PBS, Times of Israel) — the architecture-collapse scenario yesterday's brief warned of has been *deferred, not foreclosed*; the Litani-induced Israeli KIA trigger that fired Day 2 of 14 has not had a second KIA in the first 48h. Iran's diplomatic choreography refined into **five distinct institutional pillars in parallel** (FM Araghchi 'enrichment not on the agenda but will be addressed in later stages' Tasnim primary; Khamenei-advisor Shamkhani 'ready to sign for full sanctions removal'; Pezeshkian 'never bow'; Artesh-Akraminia 'surprising options'; IRGC-drill 'all objectives achieved') — internally-consistent multi-track posture, not synchronised hardening. Trump's 2-month letter window is now **the binding decision-tree input for the next 60 days** (~2026-07-16 ceiling). PRIOR (May 15): **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 2 PRODUCED JOINT STATEMENT THAT IRAN 'CAN NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON' AND STRAIT OF HORMUZ 'MUST REMAIN OPEN'** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel May 15 liveblog primary, CBS News, CNN Politics, China MFA primary readout fmprc.gov.cn 2026-05-14, Trump Fox News interview). Both sides also committed to a 'constructive China-U.S. relationship of strategic stability' framework for the next three years; Xi opposed 'militarization of the Strait' and Iran 'charging a toll' for its use. **HEU-via-China custodian door is now soft-confirmed at rhetorical-alignment level — but neither side announced an operational custodian framework, Xi has NOT publicly accepted a custodian role, and the China MFA readout preserves Iran's 'legitimate right to peaceful use of nuclear energy' escape valve.** **Trump's Fox News follow-on assertions (CLAIMED only — single source)**: Xi 'offered to broker peace with Iran,' 'won't supply Iran military equipment,' committed to buying US soybeans/oil/LNG + 200 Boeing 737s. None appear in joint statement text or China MFA readout — analyst skepticism widespread (soybean limited by cheap Brazilian alternatives per Reuters/People News Today). **TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK NOW DAY 8 POST-CLOSE WITHOUT STRIKE ORDER** — kinetic ceiling held through post-clock-close window; the May 15-20 decision corridor remains open. Pentagon 'Operation Sledgehammer' contingency naming has not been operationally invoked. Vance's softer 'still making progress' framing from May 13 has not been disputed by White House since. **Two new kinetic incidents on summit day stress-test the Hormuz commitment**: Honduras-flagged Hui Chuan seized off Fujairah bound for Iranian waters (UKMTO primary CONFIRMED ACTION; perpetrator REPORTED Iranian), and Indian-flagged dhow MSV Haj Ali sunk off Oman in suspected drone attack (CONFIRMED sinking; CLAIMED attribution). India's MEA called the Haj Ali attack 'unacceptable' — strongest public Indian condemnation of the cycle. **IDF KIA inside Litani trigger window FIRED Day 2 of 14**: Staff Sgt. Negev Dagan, 20, of Golani Brigade's 12th Battalion killed by Hezbollah mortar fire near the Litani — stress-tests the Washington Israel-Lebanon talks Day 2 closing today under State Department sponsorship (ceasefire actually expires Sunday May 17, NOT May 15 as prior brief recorded). Risk-asset complex hit complacency cycle high: VIX 17.26 (down from 17.87) and S&P 500/NASDAQ/Dow all closed at record highs May 14 while Brent rose to $106.89 (+1.11%, refusing to fall on summit), VLCC TD3C confirmed at $467,408/day via Baltic Exchange Week 17. **The 'Trump fourth reversal within 30 days' trigger remains FIRED; today's joint statement reinforces de-escalation rhetorical track without operational deliverable.** PRIOR (May 14): Trump publicly opened HEU-via-China custodian door pre-summit; Vance softer; Pentagon Sledgehammer naming; 1-week clock closing today without strike order. **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 1 IN BEIJING — TRUMP PUBLICLY OPENED HEU-VIA-CHINA CUSTODIAN DOOR**: 'only Washington or Beijing can retrieve Iran's nuclear material if Tehran agrees to hand it over' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary). MATERIAL POLICY SIGNAL — contradicts pre-departure 'doesn't need Xi' line, substitutes China for Russia as proposed HEU custodian on Day 15 of 21 Russia-track window (US officials had reportedly ruled out Russia-as-custodian per multiple May reports). Framework remains stalled on substance (Iran's HEU return-clause demand + Trump's text-light approach unchanged) — but public custodian door now re-opened in different jurisdiction. Xi has NOT publicly accepted any custodian role. **THIS IS TRUMP'S SECOND MATERIAL ROUNDABOUT IN 36 HOURS** — May 11 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE / massive life support' → May 12 South Lawn 'doesn't need Xi' → May 14 Beijing 'only Washington or Beijing can retrieve.' Consistent with the active 'Trump fourth reversal within 30 days' trigger which has now arguably FIRED (4th high-profile public reversal of cycle); but Branch 4 was on rhetoric not action. **VP VANCE MAY 13 PUBLICLY SAID US NEGOTIATORS 'STILL MAKING PROGRESS' WITH IRAN DESPITE 'UNSATISFYING RESPONSES'** (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Haaretz live May 13, The Hill, CNN); Vance also 'of course' defending administration caring about Americans' financial situation = soft-power messaging counter-weight to Trump's 'I don't think about Americans' financial situation' line. First publicly-visible US-internal-administration tone divergence of cycle. **PENTAGON 'OPERATION SLEDGEHAMMER' CONTINGENCY NAMING** (NBC News May 12 primary; JPost, Mediaite, Yahoo, WION, ZeroHedge secondary) — White House officials told NBC any new combat operations would be conducted under a new name; 'Sledgehammer not the only name under consideration.' Bureaucratic preparation = War Powers Act 60-day-clock workaround (renaming would allow administration to argue Sledgehammer is structurally separate from Operation Epic Fury, restarting 60-day clock requiring Congressional authorisation). Pre-summit leak telegraphs to Tehran that post-summit kinetic option is administratively pre-staged. **Combined picture: Vance keeps diplomatic door, Pentagon prepares kinetic option, Trump positions in middle with HEU-via-China lever that doesn't require either Russia or full-rejection.** PRIOR (May 13): (CONFIRMED ACTION + CONFIRMED RHETORIC; South Lawn primary). Pre-departure tone materially HARDER than May 6-10 pulse-test phase that floated cooperation language around Chinese leverage on Tehran. Al Jazeera + NPR led with 'doesn't need Xi'; PBS NewsHour + CSIS framed both leaders 'intent on keeping the Iran war from overshadowing the summit' = itself a downgrade from prior Chatham House 'can progress be made on Iran' framing. Delegation of 12+ US CEOs (Tim Cook, Elon Musk) travelling = TRADE-AND-TARIFFS CENTRE OF GRAVITY, not Iran. **STRUCTURAL READ: 1-week clock Day 6/7 expires May 14 while Trump is in Xi's anteroom — rules out an immediate kinetic order but public stance going in is UNCOMPROMISING rather than open.** **B7 OFAC Economic Fury extended May 11-12** (5 Chinese teapot refineries prepared secondary sanctions); China MOFCOM Blocking Rules invoked May 2 = first formal Chinese legal countermeasure. **No Trump strike order post-rejection** — Situation Room weighed Monday, no action ordered before Beijing departure. Trump 'doesn't need Xi' framing reported but not amplified by US press — neither side selling renewed-strikes as inevitable or attractive. PRIOR FRAMING (May 12): Trump publicly REJECTED Iran's formal counter-proposal as 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE' / 'garbage' / 'on massive life support'; convened WH Situation Room May 11 weighing renewed military action. PRIOR FRAMING (May 10): **TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 3/7 (CLOSES MAY 14); MATERIAL SOFTENING OF US PUBLIC POSTURE — 'NO DEADLINE / WE'LL SEE WHAT HAPPENS' VS YESTERDAY'S 'FRIDAY SHOULD RESPOND.'** Trump told reporters Saturday May 9 at Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool: 'The talks are going very well, but they have to understand — if it doesn't get signed, they're going to have a lot of pain'; separately, Trump said US has had 'very good talks with Iran over the past 24 hours' but added 'no deadline... It'll happen, it'll happen, but never a deadline' (CONFIRMED — CNBC, ABC News, CBS News, Times of Israel). The shift from 'Friday should respond' to no-deadline framing is a meaningful tone change consistent with Vali Nasr's frame ('Tehran believes time is on its side; Trump operating inside self-imposed diplomatic ceiling Pakistan demanded'). **TRUMP NOW OPERATING ACROSS THREE BACK CHANNELS, NOT ONE — Saturday's Rubio/Witkoff/al-Thani Miami meeting confirms Qatar (with IRGC senior-generals contacts) has emerged as the substantive Iran-side operational channel parallel to Pakistan's public-facing political mediation** (CONFIRMED — Axios primary scoop). 'White House views [the Qataris] as especially effective in negotiations with Iran.' This is the most consequential US-side architectural shift of the week. Pakistan retains the OFFICIAL title and political-mediation role; Qatar is the SUBSTANTIVE channel. **The 'Trump pause holds 7+ days without further kinetic exchange' trigger remains FAILED but the trinary regime is now stabilizing into a sustainable operational pattern** (US blockade with daily-cadence kinetic enforcement, parallel three-channel diplomacy, no formal Iranian response). PRIOR FRAMING (preserved): Trump May 8 evening Truth Social 'we'll knock them out a lot harder' warning operative; CENTCOM disclosed precision tally 58 vessels redirected + 4 Iranian-flagged tankers disabled since April 13 (refines yesterday's >70-tankers-held framing). Branch re-pricing: kinetic ~20-25%; extended-economic-warfare ~40-45% (UP — trinary regime hardening into sustainable pattern); negotiated-resolution ~30-35% (DOWN as Iran missed Friday May 8 soft deadline AND has not filed formal response by Day 3 of Trump 1-week clock).

active_triggers.condition: Trump orders Kharg Island ground operation
Trump activates strike-list (bridges, power stations, IRGC mine-laying boats) within 14 days of patience-window expiry (by 2026-05-10)
Trump issues fourth high-profile reversal within 30 days of April 25 (i.e., before May 25) — confirms reversal-rate is durable
active_triggers.activation_note: May 5 pause-with-progress is the 5th high-profile reversal — durable rate confirmed

active_triggers.condition: Trump pause holds for 7+ days without further kinetic exchange (Sadjadpour test — by 2026-05-12)
Russia announces formal proposal as nuclear-material custodian within 14 days of Putin-Araghchi meeting (by 2026-05-11)
Iran formally accepts or rejects the May 16 Trump nuclear letter (full dismantling + 2-month compliance) within 30 days (by 2026-06-15)
active_triggers.note: Defines the binding decision-tree input for the next 60 days. Iran's response will validate or falsify the Sadjadpour multi-track-posture-as-leverage thesis and the Nasr structural-mismatch thesis.

active_triggers.condition: Trump issues sixth high-profile reversal by 2026-06-15 — confirms structural rather than transient reversal pattern
active_triggers.activation_note: Sixth reversal fired May 17 with 'Calm Before the Storm' Truth Social post + warship-Iran animation arriving 36 hours after the joint statement → decimation → new letter sequence. The reversal pattern is now base case, not tail.

active_triggers.condition: Trump orders strike on Iranian nuclear infrastructure (or Kharg Island ground operation) within NYT-reported 'as soon as next week' window (by 2026-05-24)
active_triggers.resolution_note: Trump's Truth Social post late May 18 US time announced postponement of the planned May 19 strike at the request of Qatar, Saudi Arabia, UAE for a '2-3 day / five-day' window. Status changed from 'watching' to 'postponed_within_window' — NOT 'untripped_expired' — because Trump explicitly framed the postponement as a pause ('remain prepared for a full-scale assault at a moment's notice if negotiations fail'), keeping the option active inside the May 24 window. Brent fell -2% to ~$109.15 on the post; tail-risk de-priced but structural premium intact. Sadjadpour 'two hubris' frame validated.
active_triggers.note: NYT (citing two Middle Eastern officials) reported Israel + US conducting 'most intense preparations yet' to renew attacks 'possibly as early as next week.' This is REPORTED only — no on-record Pentagon/WH confirmation. Sadjadpour 'if US strikes commence within 7 days (by 2026-05-24), rhetoric-without-action leg fails' test. If trigger fires, Brent gaps +$8-15 toward $130-145 per markets-dossier reversibility map; VIX 28-32; defense +10-15% snap.

active_triggers.condition: Trump issues strike orders for Iranian targets within 5 days of postponement window (by 2026-05-24)
active_triggers.note: Successor trigger to the NYT 'as soon as next week' window. Trump explicitly framed the postponement as conditional ('remain prepared for a full-scale assault at a moment's notice if negotiations fail'). The May 24 window is shortened by ~6 days to the May 24 NYT-window close. If trigger fires, Brent gaps +$8-15 toward $120-130; VIX 24-28; defense +6-10% snap; StanChart $130-145 path reactivates.

active_triggers.condition: Trump or Iran formal acceptance/rejection of framework deliverable within Pakistan-mediation '2-3 day' window (by 2026-05-22)
active_triggers.note: Trump's postponement-post '2-3 day / five-day' window. Sadjadpour falsifiable test: if Iran formally accepts terms OR Trump issues a public framework deliverable within 5 days, the 'two hubris' frame produces a deal. If neither happens by 2026-05-26, postponement collapses back into kinetic-binary.

active_triggers.condition: Trump issues public framework deliverable or formal back-off from 2-month dismantlement timeline within 10 days (by 2026-05-27)
active_triggers.note: Nasr falsifiable test: if Trump's 'Calm Before the Storm' post is followed within 10 days by either (a) a public framework deliverable with verification, or (b) actual strikes, the framing is testable. If neither (rhetoric without follow-on), the reversal-as-base-case reading further confirms.

recent_signals.headline: **TRUMP POSTPONED THE MAY 19 STRIKE AT GULF LEADERS' REQUEST — TRUTH SOCIAL: 'WE WILL NOT BE DOING THE SCHEDULED ATTACK OF IRAN TOMORROW.' '2-3 DAY / FIVE-DAY' WINDOW FOR NEGOTIATIONS VIA PAKISTAN. NYT-WINDOW TRIGGER RESOLVES POSTPONED_WITHIN_WINDOW.** Late May 18 US time, Trump posted on Truth Social that he had informed US military leaders 'that we will NOT be doing the scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow' in light of requests from Qatari Emir Tamim, Saudi Crown Prince MbS, and UAE President MbZ. At the White House Monday evening, Trump told reporters Saudi/Qatar/UAE 'and some others' asked for 'two or three days, a short period of time, because they think they are getting very close to making a deal.' Trump explicitly framed the postponement as a pause not a cancellation: 'remain prepared for a full-scale assault on Iran at a moment's notice if negotiations fail to produce an acceptable agreement.' **Market repricing**: Brent -2% to ~$109.15 on the post (CNBC primary, NDTV Profit primary); Brent settled $110.32 (-1.6% 1D); WTI -4.7% to $103.57; VIX -3.3% to 17.82; RBOB -4.8%. **Structural premium intact**: $110.32 still 51% above $73 baseline; Hormuz remains effectively closed (~1-30 vessels/day vs 138 pre-war); AWRP 4-6x pre-crisis; structural-bid trio (XLE +1.9%, Frontline +2.9%, Cheniere +2.4%, Lockheed +2.4% on $879M F-35 contract May 18 + $991M EW May 15) all UP on Brent-down day. **Iran response (CONFIRMED PROCEDURAL ACTION on Pakistan channel; CONFIRMED RHETORIC on framing)**: FM spokesman Baghaei (via Tasnim) confirmed counter-proposal delivered through Pakistan with demands — unfreezing of frozen assets, lifting of sanctions, end of US blockade of Iranian ports, 'stoppage of fighting in all aspects' (incl. Lebanon), compensation for war damages — far apart from US zero-enrichment red line. Iran state TV (IRIB) simultaneously called the postponement a 'retreat' based on 'fear' via broadcast ticker and X account, converting the postponement into Iranian rhetorical win. **Houthi proxy axis re-armed rhetorically (CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NO ACTION)**: Yemen's Houthis announced 'maritime blockade' of Israel's Haifa port via spokesman Yahya Saree, breaking Monday's 'coordinated quietism' reading — but no Haifa attack has been confirmed and Haifa is on the Mediterranean (far from Houthi missile reach). **India cascade fired (CONFIRMED ACTION)**: India raised petrol/diesel by ~90 paise/litre, second hike in a week — April 27 fuel-pass-through trigger ACTIVE_FIRED inside its 30-day window. USD/INR weakened to ₹96.44 fresh record DESPITE postponement (Camp B signal — structural drivers override geopolitical relief). **Defense systems reportedly activated on Iran's Qeshm Island in the Strait of Hormuz late Monday** (REPORTED single-source); Iranian officials reported situation 'under control' — consistent with Trump's 'remain prepared' framing. **NYT 'as soon as next week' trigger (added May 17) resolves POSTPONED_WITHIN_WINDOW** rather than untripped_expired. **Helima Croft 'Tuesday close vs $112' binary resolves toward FALSE-POSITIVE SUSTAIN-RULE FIRE pending close**: StanChart $130-145 path loses momentum; Goldman base case ($120 Q3 / $115 Q4 if Hormuz remains mostly shut) re-anchors as central. **Sadjadpour 'two hubris' frame operationally validated in real-time**: Trump's performative-dealmaker brand permitted accepting the postponement (Gulf leaders' 'Great Leaders and Allies' language was Trump's own); Iran's architecture continues to require public framing of any pause as adversary-weakness. **The cleanest read: postponement, not de-escalation. Kinetic axis slipped 48-120 hours; diplomatic axis hardened; proxy axis re-armed rhetorically.**
sources: CNBC 'Trump says he's postponing scheduled attack of Iran tomorrow'
Bloomberg 'Trump Says Holding Off on New Iran Strikes After Gulf Appeal'
NPR 'Trump says he's called off Iran strike at request of Gulf allies'
Israel Hayom 'Trump delayed Iran strike at Gulf leaders' request'
IRIB (Iranian state TV 'retreat based on fear' framing)
Reuters wire (Houthi Haifa announcement via Yahoo, gCaptain, Ship&Bunker)
recent_signals.verification: Trump postponement post = CONFIRMED ACTION (Trump's own primary + 7+ outlets); 'remain prepared for full-scale assault at a moment's notice' framing = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Trump primary); Baghaei counter-proposal via Pakistan = CONFIRMED PROCEDURAL ACTION (Tasnim primary); IRIB 'retreat based on fear' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Iran state TV primary); Houthi Haifa announcement = CONFIRMED RHETORIC, NO ACTION (Reuters wire + Maritime Executive scare quotes); India fuel hike = CONFIRMED ACTION (WION + Goodreturns); Brent tape -1.6% 1D = CONFIRMED operational; Qeshm Island defense activation = REPORTED single-source.

recent_signals.headline: **TUESDAY MAY 19 NSC MEETING IS THE OPERATIONAL BINARY** — Day 1 of 6 remaining in the NYT 'as soon as next week' window (closes May 24). Per Haaretz May 18 sourcing (REPORTED — single Israeli sourcing chain via Haaretz; not US-confirmed; no White House public announcement through Monday morning IST), Trump is expected to convene his top national security team Tuesday May 19 to discuss options for military action. **CONFIRMED WEEKEND EVENTS**: Trump-Netanyahu phone call Sunday May 17 ahead of limited Israeli security cabinet meeting (FM Sa'ar, Defense Min Katz, Finance Min Smotrich, NSC Min Ben Gvir, Shas chair Deri = war-decision quorum); both sides framing as 'renewing the war with Iran'; Netanyahu addressed Cabinet 'our eyes are also open' regarding Iran 'prepared for any scenario'; Trump posted **'for Iran, the clock is ticking'** on Truth Social later Sunday (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Trump's own primary account). **Haaretz May 18 'As Trump Hesitates, Israel Prepares for Renewed Iran Strikes' is the cleanest publicly stated US-Israel divergence framing of the cycle** — Israeli defense establishment positioning for unilateral preparation while Trump described as hesitating. Haaretz with strongest IDF sourcing; framing is at minimum the senior IDF reading, at maximum a deliberate Israeli leak intended to *pressure* Trump toward action. **Saudi drone interception May 17 (3 drones from Iraqi airspace, Saudi MoD 'right to respond at the appropriate time and place') and UAE Barakah Nuclear Energy Plant drone strike May 17 (1 of 3 drones caused fire at perimeter generator, IAEA 'grave concern') land on the same weekend** — maximal-pressure tape from all sides. **Markets price the binary**: Brent gapped above $108 sustained 2 sessions ($109.26 Friday close + $111.47 Monday) → StanChart $130-145 path activates; USD/INR ₹96.29 record (Day 6 of 5-7 trigger fires); Sensex/Nifty open -1.30%/-1.04%. **Tuesday NSC operational binary**: (a) strike order = Brent +$8-15 to $120-130, VIX 24-28, defense +6-10% snap, S&P -3-5%; (b) public back-off framework = Brent retraces $5-8 to $103-106, VIX 14-16, defense continues structural decline, S&P +1-2%; (c) nothing operational = Branch 2 extended-economic-warfare holds, Brent $107-112, VIX 18-20. **Sadjadpour falsifiable test**: if strikes by May 24, 'rhetoric without action' fails; if not, sixth-reversal pattern further confirms. **Nasr test (May 27)**: framework deliverable with verification OR actual strikes = testable; neither = reversal-as-base-case confirms.
sources: Trump Truth Social primary ('for Iran, the clock is ticking')
Times of Israel May 17 liveblog (Trump-Netanyahu call primary)
Haaretz May 18 'As Trump Hesitates, Israel Prepares for Renewed Iran Strikes'
Saudi Gazette 'Al-Maliki: Three drones from Iraq intercepted'
Intel dossier 2026-05-18 A1, A3, A11, B1, B3
recent_signals.verification: Trump-Netanyahu phone call + Israeli security cabinet = CONFIRMED ACTION (multi-outlet primary; Times of Israel liveblog + Fox + ITV + Haaretz); 'clock is ticking' Truth Social post = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Trump primary); Tuesday NSC meeting = REPORTED (single Israeli sourcing chain via Haaretz; no White House public confirmation through Monday morning IST); 'As Trump Hesitates, Israel Prepares' framing = CONFIRMED Israeli press framing (Haaretz primary); Saudi drone intercept = CONFIRMED ACTION (Saudi MoD + multi-source); UAE Barakah strike = CONFIRMED ACTION (UAE MoD + IAEA primary).

recent_signals.headline: **TRUMP PIVOTS FROM RHETORICAL REVERSAL TO KINETIC PREPARATION POSTURE — 'CALM BEFORE THE STORM' TRUTH SOCIAL POSTS + NYT REPORTS 'MOST INTENSE PREPARATIONS YET' TO RENEW STRIKES ON IRAN 'AS SOON AS NEXT WEEK'.** Sunday morning IST, Trump posted on Truth Social an AI-generated graphic of himself and a US Navy admiral in front of stormy waters with several ships including an Iranian-flagged vessel, captioned **'It Was The Calm Before the Storm'** (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 17 liveblog primary + Ynet + Israel National News + India TV + Egypt Today + IANS + Arab Times + Al Bawaba). A second post showed an animation of a US warship targeting an aircraft marked with the Iranian flag, with Trump's voice ordering **'Okay, we have it in our sight. Fire!'** (CONFIRMED RHETORIC). NYT broke the preparation/commando/Kharg story (Friday May 15 / Saturday May 16) citing two Middle Eastern officials: Israel and the United States are carrying out **'most intense preparations yet to renew attacks on Iran, possibly as soon as next week'** — options include (i) commando operations to extract nuclear material believed buried under rubble at struck nuclear sites ('thousands of supporting forces to create a perimeter,' US officials acknowledged 'would risk several casualties' and likely engage Iranian ground troops); and (ii) ground forces to seize Kharg Island (handles up to 90% of Iranian oil exports). NYT scoop amplified by Times of Israel May 16 liveblog, Jerusalem Post 'US-Israel Iran attacks could resume next week' (article 896353), Gulf News 'Operation Epic Fury 2.0,' Fox News 'Next US move on Iran: Seize Kharg Island,' CNN Politics 'Trump returns from China with no Iran breakthrough — and a decision to make' (Pentagon hawks vs Vance-diplomacy track explicitly described). **NO on-record Pentagon/White House confirmation of operation planning.** US intelligence reporting (cited in NYT) indicates Iran has moved additional military personnel and air defenses to Kharg Island in recent weeks — operational preparation on both sides (REPORTED). **PARALLEL DIPLOMATIC TRACK INTENSIFIES (CONFIRMED ACTION):** Pakistani Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi arrived Tehran Saturday May 16 on 2-day official visit explicitly described as 'to facilitate' US-Iran peace talks; received by Iranian Interior Minister Eskandar Momeni. **The simultaneity is the signal:** Naqvi mediation landing on SAME WEEKEND as Trump 'Calm Before the Storm' post + NYT preparation report. Trump can simultaneously prepare strikes and hold an open mediation channel — diplomatic and kinetic tracks now running in clear tension, not sequence. **SIXTH HIGH-PROFILE PUBLIC POSTURE SHIFT IN 30 DAYS** (joint statement Thursday → 'decimation' Truth Social same day → new ultimatum letter Saturday → 'Calm Before the Storm' Sunday + parallel Pakistan-mediation track) — the rhetorical-volatility pattern is now structurally embedded as base case, not tail. The sixth-reversal trigger added May 16 has FIRED. Markets closed Sunday — first repricing event is Monday May 18 Asian open. **Monday May 18 close above $108 Brent = 2-session-sustain rule met = StanChart $130-145 path activates.** Vali Nasr structural-mismatch thesis at sharpest of cycle. Souffan Center 'escalate to de-escalate' framing at maximum-density expression. Karim Sadjadpour falsifiability: if US strikes commence within next 7 days (by May 24), 'rhetoric without action' leg fails.
sources: Trump Truth Social primary (Calm Before the Storm graphic + warship-Iran animation)
Times of Israel May 17 liveblog (Trump posts amplification + IDF Hezbollah update)
Ynet + Israel National News + India TV + Egypt Today + IANS + Arab Times + Al Bawaba (Trump posts amplification)
New York Times (Friday-Saturday May 15-16) via Times of Israel May 16 liveblog amplification — two Middle Eastern officials attribution
Times of Israel May 16 liveblog 'As Iran talks stall, Israel and US prepping to renew war as soon as next week — report'
Jerusalem Post May 16 'US-Israel Iran attacks could resume next week' article 896353
Gulf News May 17 'Operation Epic Fury 2.0: US and Israel Weigh Kharg Island Strike, Uranium Seizure Mission in Iran Amid War Fears'
Fox News 'Next US move on Iran: Seize Kharg Island'
CNN Politics May 16 'Trump returns from China with no Iran breakthrough — and a decision to make'
Daily Pakistan May 16 'Naqvi in Tehran in Pakistan's push to revive stalled US-Iran Talks' Pakistani primary
Pakistan Today May 16 (two pieces — Naqvi landed in Tehran + Pakistan-Iran reaffirm regional stability)
BSS News 'Pakistani minister arrives in Tehran to facilitate US-Iran peace talks'
Pezeshkian Sunday social media post (Iran civilian primary)
recent_signals.verification: Trump 'Calm Before the Storm' Truth Social post = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Trump's own primary account + 7+ outlets); Trump warship-Iran animation 'Okay we have it in our sight, Fire!' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Trump primary); NYT preparation report (commando + Kharg ground option + 'as soon as next week') = REPORTED only (two Middle Eastern officials, NYT national security desk; multi-outlet amplification; NO on-record Pentagon/WH confirmation); Iran-Kharg air-defense reinforcement = REPORTED (single-source US intel chain via NYT); Pakistan-Naqvi Tehran visit = CONFIRMED ACTION (Daily Pakistan + Pakistan Today + BSS News multi-source primary); CNN 'decision to make' framing = CONFIRMED RHETORIC framing (CNN primary); sixth-reversal pattern = CONFIRMED structural observation (multi-source 30-day window).

recent_signals.headline: **TRUMP IMMEDIATELY REVERSED POST-SUMMIT (FIFTH HIGH-PROFILE REVERSAL IN 30 DAYS) AND ON MAY 16 SENT IRAN A NEW NUCLEAR PROPOSAL LETTER demanding full dismantling + halt to all enrichment + end of proxy support within 2-month compliance window.** (CONFIRMED letter sent — Trump confirmed; CLAIMED letter contents — RedState May 15 + Wikipedia 2025-2026 negotiations summary; primary text not yet surfaced). The Thursday joint statement produced **ZERO operational follow-through** — no HEU-custodian framework, no Chinese security guarantees, no verification architecture. Within hours of departing China, Trump posted on Truth Social that **'the military decimation of Iran' is 'to be continued'** (Times of Israel May 15 liveblog primary); told Sean Hannity on Fox 'I am not going to be much more patient'; told the Detroit News post-summit that he 'did not ask China for any favours' — directly contradicting his Fox News-only Wednesday claim that Xi offered to broker peace. The China-as-HEU-custodian door yesterday's brief recorded as 'soft-confirmed at the rhetorical-alignment level' is now **operationally empty** — the joint statement WAS the deliverable, not a step toward one. Three publicly-visible inconsistent positions in 48 hours: (a) Wednesday Fox News claim Xi offered to broker Iran peace + buy soybeans + 200 Boeings; (b) Thursday joint statement strategic-stability framework + Iran no-nuclear-weapon + Hormuz must remain open; (c) Thursday/Friday Truth Social 'decimation to be continued' + Hannity 'not patient' + Detroit News 'didn't ask for favours.' Khamenei advisor Ali Shamkhani publicly responded that Iran is ready to sign in exchange for quick removal of all financial sanctions but criticised Trump's rhetoric — cleanest Iranian conditional-acceptance signal of the cycle, attached to the Supreme Leader's office. Iranian officials denied receiving any new US proposal and insisted Iran would not give up the right to enrich uranium; FM Araghchi told Tasnim that enrichment is 'currently not on the agenda of discussions or negotiations' but 'will be addressed in later stages' — the cleanest tactical-defer framing of the cycle. **US markets priced the reversal cleanly**: S&P -1.24% to 7,408.50, NASDAQ -1.54% to 26,225.14, Dow -1.07% lost 50K handle, 10Y +14bp to 4.595% (highest since Feb 2025), 30Y +11bp to 5.121%, VIX 17.26→18.43; tech sold off hard (Intel -6%, AMD -5.7%, Micron -6.6%, Nvidia -4.4%); WTI +11% weekly; gold -1.83% to $4,564; silver -10.6% one-day to $77.52. Iran's 'multi-track posture as leverage' (Sadjadpour) and 'time on its side' (Nasr) structural reads are reinforced; Helima Croft's 'White House successful in convincing a corner of the market the war will be over soon' framing held through Thursday and **broke Friday**.
sources: Times of Israel May 15 liveblog — 'Trump posts that the military decimation of Iran is to be continued' (primary)
Detroit News May 15 — 'Trump says he is losing patience with Iran, did not ask China for any favors' (primary)
Fox News / Hannity interview — 'I am not going to be much more patient' (primary)
RedState May 15 — Trump's May 16 letter analysis (secondary; treat as reported until primary text)
Wikipedia 2025-2026 Iran-United States negotiations — May 16 letter + Shamkhani response (secondary)
Tasnim News Agency — Araghchi 'enrichment not on agenda' (primary Iranian semi-official)
CNBC May 15 markets live updates (S&P, NASDAQ, Dow)
Bloomberg May 15 — 'worst weekly Treasury rout in a year'
Yahoo Finance / Fortune May 15 — bond yields
recent_signals.verification: Trump 'decimation' Truth Social post = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (ToI liveblog primary, multi-source amplified); Trump May 16 letter EXISTENCE = CONFIRMED (Trump confirmed May 16); letter CONTENTS (full dismantling + 2-month compliance + halt enrichment + end proxy support) = CLAIMED (secondary analysis pieces, primary text not surfaced); Hannity 'not patient' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Fox primary); Detroit News 'didn't ask for favours' = CONFIRMED (Detroit News primary); Shamkhani conditional acceptance = REPORTED (Wikipedia compilation, single-original Iranian press); Araghchi 'enrichment not on agenda' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (Tasnim primary); US market closes = CONFIRMED tape; pattern of three inconsistent positions in 48h = CONFIRMED multi-source structural observation.

recent_signals.headline: **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 2 PRODUCED JOINT STATEMENT: IRAN 'CAN NEVER HAVE A NUCLEAR WEAPON' + STRAIT OF HORMUZ 'MUST REMAIN OPEN'** (CONFIRMED — Times of Israel May 15 liveblog primary, CBS News, CNN Politics, China MFA official readout, Al Jazeera, Asian Mirror, Trump Fox News interview). Both sides committed to a 'constructive China-U.S. relationship of strategic stability' framework guiding the next three years; Xi opposed 'militarization of the Strait of Hormuz' and any effort to 'charge a toll' for its use, and said China is interested in purchasing more American oil to reduce dependence on the Strait. **The HEU-via-China custodian door yesterday's brief opened as a watching trigger with June 13 ceiling is now soft-confirmed at rhetorical-alignment level — but neither side announced an operational custodian arrangement, Xi has NOT publicly accepted any custodian role, and the China MFA readout preserves Iran's 'legitimate right to peaceful use of nuclear energy' escape valve.** **Trump's Fox News follow-on assertions (CLAIMED — single source, NOT in joint statement text)**: Xi 'offered to broker peace with Iran,' assured China 'would not provide military equipment to Iran,' committed to buying US soybeans/oil/LNG + 200 Boeing 737s. Analyst skepticism widespread — China's existing soybean appetite limited by cheap Brazilian alternatives (per Reuters via People News Today); pattern matches the 'one side's framing as fact' disinformation playbook flagged in March 2026. **TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 8 POST-CLOSE WITHOUT STRIKE ORDER** — kinetic ceiling held through post-clock-close window; the May 15-20 decision corridor remains open. Pentagon 'Operation Sledgehammer' contingency naming has not been operationally invoked. Vance's softer 'still making progress' framing has not been disputed by White House. The Trump fourth reversal trigger remains FIRED — today's joint statement reinforces de-escalation rhetorical track without operational deliverable. No Iranian official has publicly welcomed the joint statement; Iranian Army spokesperson Brig. Gen. Mohammad Akraminia (IRNA interview) warned of 'surprising options' if adversaries make another 'miscalculation' — fresh kinetic-preparation rhetoric from Artesh spokesperson distinct from Pezeshkian's civilian 'never bow' framing and from the IRGC's drill-based readiness signaling.
sources: Times of Israel May 15 liveblog (joint statement primary)
Trump Fox News interview (CLAIMED single source for Boeing/soybean/HEU follow-on)
Reuters via People News Today (analyst skepticism on soybeans)
Haaretz live May 13 (Vance softer line carryover)
recent_signals.verification: Joint statement text + China MFA readout = CONFIRMED multi-cluster primary; Hormuz 'must remain open' + Iran no-nuclear-weapon language = CONFIRMED in both readouts; Trump Fox News follow-on (Boeing 200, soybeans, won't supply Iran military equipment, broker peace) = CLAIMED only (single source, NOT in joint statement, China MFA does NOT enumerate); 1-week clock Day 8 without strike order = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source; Pentagon Sledgehammer naming not invoked = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; Vance softer line not disputed = CONFIRMED ABSENCE; Akraminia 'surprising options' = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (IRNA primary).

recent_signals.headline: **TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK CLOSES TODAY (Day 7/7) WITHOUT STRIKE ORDER while Trump in Beijing** — forced-pause-via-Beijing operationally validated through clock close (CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source). **TRUMP-XI SUMMIT DAY 1 — TRUMP PUBLICLY OPENED HEU-VIA-CHINA CUSTODIAN DOOR**: 'only Washington or Beijing can retrieve Iran's nuclear material if Tehran agrees to hand it over' (CONFIRMED RHETORIC — Times of Israel May 14 liveblog primary). Material policy signal: contradicts pre-departure 'doesn't need Xi' line, substitutes China for Russia as proposed HEU custodian. Trump's THIRD high-profile public posture shift in 36 hours: May 11 'TOTALLY UNACCEPTABLE / massive life support' → May 12 'doesn't need Xi' South Lawn → May 14 Beijing 'Washington or Beijing can retrieve.' Pattern consistent with active 'Trump fourth reversal within 30 days' trigger which has now fired across rhetoric track. Xi opened with 'partners rather than rivals' / 'Thucydides Trap' / wants 2026 'landmark year' — Xi has NOT publicly accepted any custodian role. **VP VANCE MAY 13 PUBLICLY SOFTER LINE** — negotiators 'still making progress' despite 'unsatisfying responses' (Haaretz live May 13, Hill, CNN CONFIRMED RHETORIC). Vance also 'of course' defending administration caring about Americans' financial situation = soft-power messaging counter-weight to Trump's 'I don't think about Americans' financial situation.' First publicly-visible US-internal-administration tone divergence. **PENTAGON 'OPERATION SLEDGEHAMMER' CONTINGENCY NAMING** (REPORTED — NBC News May 12 primary): WH officials told NBC any new combat operations conducted under new name; 'Sledgehammer not the only name under consideration.' War Powers Act 60-day-clock-reset workaround. Combined picture: Vance keeps diplomatic door, Pentagon prepares kinetic option, Trump positions in middle with HEU-via-China lever. NBC (not Fox) breaking leak = anonymous Pentagon-source through Democrat-aligned outlet pattern. Trump's Truth Social silent on Iran today; CEO delegation (Tim Cook, Elon Musk) centre of gravity remains trade-and-tariffs.
sources: Times of Israel May 14 liveblog (Trump HEU-via-China statement)
CNBC 'Xi asks Trump if U.S. and China can avoid Thucydides Trap'
Al Jazeera Trump-Xi summit live blog
NBC News primary 'Pentagon considering renaming Iran war Sledgehammer'
JPost + Mediaite + Yahoo + ZeroHedge + WION (Sledgehammer amplification)
recent_signals.verification: Trump HEU-via-China statement = CONFIRMED RHETORIC (ToI May 14 liveblog primary); 1-week clock close without strike order = CONFIRMED ABSENCE multi-source; Vance softer line = CONFIRMED RHETORIC multi-source; Sledgehammer naming = REPORTED PREPARATION (NBC primary, not an order).

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP DEPARTED FOR BEIJING LATE MAY 12 DECLARING HE 'DOES NOT NEED XI'S HELP' ON IRAN — US WILL WIN 'ONE WAY OR THE OTHER'; framework still on 'massive life support' (CONFIRMED ACTION + RHETORIC; South Lawn primary). Pre-Beijing posture materially HARDER than May 6-10 pulse-test phase that floated cooperation language on Chinese leverage on Tehran. Al Jazeera + NPR led with 'doesn't need Xi'; PBS NewsHour + CSIS framed both leaders 'intent on keeping Iran war from overshadowing summit' = expectation downgrade vs prior Chatham House 'can progress be made on Iran' framing. 12+ US CEOs (Tim Cook, Elon Musk) travelling = trade-and-tariffs centre of gravity, not Iran. Summit May 14-15 closes 1-week clock window May 14 while Trump in Xi's anteroom — RULES OUT immediate kinetic order but public stance going in is UNCOMPROMISING. **NO TRUMP STRIKE ORDER post-rejection** — Situation Room weighed Monday, no action ordered before Beijing departure. Trump's 'we'll win one way or the other' framing reported but NOT amplified by US press — neither side of US press selling renewed-strikes as inevitable or attractive. Russia HEU-custodian Day 14 of 21 watch (post-Putin-Araghchi window May 18) = non-event so far. No formal Iranian kinetic retaliation since May 4-5 UAE small-scale; Iran missile fire rate -92% from peak (JPost + CNN intel).
sources: Al Jazeera 'Trump downplays US-Iran differences as he heads to Beijing'
NPR 'Trump goes to China as Iran war smolders'
BusinessToday India 'Trump Xi Beijing summit begins May 13'
Jerusalem Post 'Iran missile fire rate collapsed 92%'
CNN US intel Iran missile capability
recent_signals.verification: Trump Beijing departure + 'doesn't need Xi' = CONFIRMED ACTION + CONFIRMED RHETORIC multi-source primary (South Lawn); summit centre of gravity = CONFIRMED multi-source; no strike order post-rejection = CONFIRMED ABSENCE (no Truth Social/Pentagon announcement); Iran missile fire rate -92% = REPORTED (JPost + CNN intel).

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP 1-WEEK CLOCK DAY 3/7; MATERIAL SOFTENING — 'NO DEADLINE / WE'LL SEE WHAT HAPPENS' VS YESTERDAY'S 'FRIDAY SHOULD RESPOND'; TRUMP NOW OPERATING ACROSS THREE BACK CHANNELS — RUBIO/WITKOFF/AL-THANI MIAMI MEETING SATURDAY CONFIRMS QATAR (WITH IRGC SENIOR-GENERALS CONTACTS) HAS EMERGED AS SUBSTANTIVE IRAN-SIDE OPERATIONAL CHANNEL. Trump at Lincoln Memorial Saturday: 'The talks are going very well, but they have to understand — if it doesn't get signed, they're going to have a lot of pain'; separately: 'no deadline... It'll happen, it'll happen, but never a deadline.' Per Axios scoop, 'White House views [Qataris] as especially effective in negotiations with Iran' — Pakistan retains OFFICIAL title and political-mediation role; Qatar is the SUBSTANTIVE Iran-side channel via IRGC generals. CENTCOM disclosed precision tally May 9: 58 commercial vessels redirected + 4 Iranian-flagged tankers disabled since April 13 (refines yesterday's >70-tankers-held framing). The 'Trump pause holds 7+ days' trigger remains FAILED but trinary regime stabilizing into sustainable pattern (blockade + parallel three-channel diplomacy + no formal Iranian response). Iran formal response still pending as of Day 3 of 7.
sources: CNBC (Trump 'very good talks' at Lincoln Memorial)
Times of Israel May 9-10 live blogs
recent_signals.verification: Trump no-deadline softening = CONFIRMED RHETORIC multi-source primary; Qatar back-channel emergence = REPORTED via Axios primary scoop multi-corroborated (Iran does not confirm or deny publicly); CENTCOM 58/4 tally = CONFIRMED ACTION (CENTCOM primary, multi-source)

recent_signals.headline: TRUMP-IRAN 14-POINT MOU FRAMEWORK DRAFTED; 48-HR IRAN RESPONSE WINDOW (~MAY 8 PM); 'BOMBING STARTS AT SIGNIFICANTLY HIGHER LEVEL AND INTENSITY' IF NO DEAL. Witkoff+Kushner negotiating directly + via Pakistani mediators. MOU provisions: end-of-war declaration, 12-15 yr Iran enrichment moratorium, Iran ships out HEU stockpile, US lifts sanctions/frozen assets, BOTH sides lift Hormuz blockades, 30-day post-signing detail window. Markets adjudicated upside (Brent -7% May 6 to ~$103, S&P record +1.5%, KOSPI 7,485 record); downside NOT priced — if Iran rejects expect Brent +$8-15/24h. Vali Nasr (Bloomberg/DAWN) explicitly challenged framing as overclaiming — 'claimed Iran had agreed to giving up its nuclear program without actually those agreements having been made.' Sadjadpour: 48hr window structurally inadequate given Mojtaba absence + factional split.
recent_signals.verification: MOU drafting = REPORTED (Axios scoop multi-corroborated, final text not published); Trump bombing warning = CONFIRMED (Truth Social primary, CBS/NBC corroborated); RHETORIC/THREAT (no operational deployment to support); Nasr critique = CONFIRMED (Bloomberg primary, DAWN MENA primary)

historical_summaries.summary: 7 signals. Issued 48-hour ultimatum demanding Iran reopen Hormuz or face strikes on power grid | Posted on Truth Social claiming 'productive conversations' with Iran and announced 5-day strike pause | Claimed 15 points of agreement with Iran including 'never have a nuclear weapon,' with April 9 target date

36 signals. EXIT TIMELINE EMERGING: (1) Trump stated US could end Iran war in '2-3 weeks' — first public exit timeline (RHETORIC, but markets priced it: | First primetime address to nation on the war (April 1 evening) | 28% Republican disapproval per CNN poll
